tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh --non-interactive from inside $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with '[FAIL] Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18 / U-N+U-O fix verified).

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 exit 0; '[OK] Phase 1 architecture planning started'.

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: .claude/process-state.json .phase1_architecture.steps_completed is an array.

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed via --complete-step; final state shows 5/5.

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh: 'Phase gates consistent.' RC=0.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression: check-phase-gate.sh prints 'Phase gates consistent' but does NOT advance .current_phase. Manual jq edit required.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing phase1_architecture (5/5 steps), run scripts/check-phase-gate.sh; observe '[OK] Phase gates consistent.' but jq -r '.current_phase' .claude/phase-state.json still returns 0.
framework_bugs.expected: After phase1 steps complete and gate passes, .current_phase should auto-advance to 1 (or some script provided to advance it).
framework_bugs.actual: check-phase-gate.sh validates consistency only; no documented script advances .current_phase. UAT continued by manually editing phase-state.json with jq.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: After --start-feature uat-feat-1, .build_loop.feature = 'uat-feat-1'.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 BUILD_LOOP_STEPS (tests_written..documentation_updated) and feature_recorded (6/6) completed sequentially with stub artifacts (src/uat-feat-1.ts, tests/uat-feat-1.test.ts, docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md).

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: Direct git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded RC=0 after all 5 build-loop steps complete.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct shell git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' SUCCEEDED — U-C confirmation. The PreToolUse hook only fires through Claude Code, not shell-direct git. Recording as known-open prior-sweep bug per runbook guidance.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After test-gate.sh --record-feature uat-feat-1 + complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, started uat-feat-2, drove all 5 steps, and committed with feat(uat-2) — RC=0. Grace window reset correctly (PR #17 fix holds).

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: With valid sentinel from pending-approval.sh --offer, pre-commit-gate.sh outputs PreToolUse permissionDecision=deny with the pending question. Verified via stdin JSON {"tool_input":{"command":"git commit -m test"}}.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removes the sentinel; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh emits no deny output (clean RC=0).

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: .claude/build-progress.json .features_completed contains 'uat-feat-1' (and 'uat-feat-2' from grace-window test).

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: BL-006 git commit-msg hook does not block shell-direct feat: commits
framework_bugs.reproduction: In a project at Phase 2 with no Build Loop in flight, run `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(x): no loop'` from shell. Commit succeeds (RC=0) with no gate intervention.
framework_bugs.expected: BL-006 should reject feat: commits without a recorded Build Loop, regardless of invocation path.
framework_bugs.actual: Commit completed successfully. Pre-commit-gate.sh only fires via the PreToolUse hook (Claude Code path) — there is no installed git commit-msg / pre-commit hook in .git/hooks. Confirms still-open prior-sweep bug U-C.

documentation_gaps.gap: BL-010 / U-C: pre-commit-gate.sh blocks via Claude Code's PreToolUse only; nothing protects against shell-direct git commits in a freshly-init'd project. A git commit-msg or pre-commit hook should be installed by init.sh.

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 exit 0; warnings about feature-since-UAT count printed but did not block.

tests.name: start_uat_creates_session

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh exit 0 in both forms — without args (prints usage, RC=0) and with the unfilled template HTML (correctly flags 21 placeholders, RC=0). Linter is operational.

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS completed sequentially; final 9/9.

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh emits warnings about HANDOFF.md, INCIDENT_RESPONSE.md, sbom.json, SECURITY.md, pen-test absence — but RC=0. Process checklist 9 steps completed reported.

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: phase4_release:handoff_written gated on HANDOFF.md presence — verified via artifact-check logic at scripts/process-checklist.sh:333-339; step succeeded only after HANDOFF.md was created.

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: phase4_release:go_live_verified checks RELEASE_NOTES.md (process-checklist.sh:340-345); template-generated RELEASE_NOTES.md was sufficient.

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase = 4 after Phase 4 complete (manually advanced earlier given U-D); .claude/process-state.json .phase4_release.steps_completed has all 6 steps.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep across committed files for password|api_key|secret|token surfaces only legitimate references: GitHub Actions secrets (${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}), workflow comments, and doc text in platform-modules/web.md and builders-guide.md. No hardcoded credentials.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — .claude/process-audit.log not present; no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run, so absence is expected per runbook.

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find $WORKDIR/.claude -name '*.tmp' returns nothing.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (unchanged from setup capture). git status shows pre-existing untracked entries (.claude/, Reports/uat-2026-04-26/) only — these existed at session start. git diff $FRAMEWORK_HEAD is empty.

summary: Base personal/web/standard config: all sections A-E plus G passed; init.sh --non-interactive worked end-to-end; PR #17 (BL-015 sentinel + helpers copied), PR #18 (framework-self guard, fake-remote tolerance), PR #19 (--non-interactive mode) all verified. Two known-open prior-sweep bugs re-confirmed at Medium severity: U-C (shell-direct feat: commit bypasses BL-006) and U-D (no script advances current_phase after gate passes).
